name: Innophos Holdings, Inc.
description: Innophos Holdings, Inc. is a leading international producer of specialty ingredient solutions that deliver versatile, high-performance, and science-backed ingredients for the food, beverage, dietary supplement, and industrial markets. The company specializes in phosphate-based formulations, minerals, and other specialty ingredients that improve the quality, texture, nutritional value, and shelf life of consumer products. Headquartered in Cranbury, New Jersey, Innophos operates manufacturing facilities across the United States, Canada, and Mexico.
